payloadExamples.label: Search success response with label audit reusing the existing single issue changeSets contract

body.message: GitLab get label events operation failed

details: filters.audit contains unsupported values [milestone]; supported values are [label]

validationBoundary.rule: pagination.page and pagination.perPage must be positive
validationBoundary.reason: Standard scalar validation stays declarative at HTTP binding

validationBoundary.rule: filters.audit missing, null, empty, and null elements all normalize to no audit request
validationBoundary.reason: Client declared null like cases must behave identically before orchestration logic runs

validationBoundary.rule: filters.audit must contain only supported values [label]; duplicate supported values collapse to one orchestration request
validationBoundary.reason: Supported audit types are orchestration semantics and cannot be expressed cleanly with standard bean validation while ignoring null elements

validationBoundary.rule: pagination.perPage must be less than or equal to 40
validationBoundary.reason: Existing runtime guard remains the single owner of configurable page size enforcement

models.justification: Issue remains the orchestration layer entity reused by search and create. Adding nullable changeSets keeps audit enrichment in the same business model instead of creating a parallel search only entity, which matches the locked reuse constraint and constitution mapping boundaries.
models.notes: Preserve changeSets as null when audit is not requested; copy changeSets only when non null so null and empty list remain distinct contract states.

models.justification: SearchIssuesInput is an orchestration use case input that separates provider query parameters from audit enrichment intent. This keeps raw REST audit strings out of IssuesService and keeps IssueQuery aligned with the single GitLab search call executed by the adapter.
models.notes: Normalize null auditTypes to List.of(); IssuesRequestMapper supplies a deduplicated stable order list.

models.justification: IssueAuditType is an orchestration enum because audit selection drives orchestration behavior after the base search completes and must be future extensible without changing the endpoint shape.
models.notes: LABEL carries the request transport value label. This input token is intentionally distinct from the response side ChangeField.LABEL enum that is already exposed by the single issue changeSets contract.

models.justification: IssueFiltersRequest remains a REST transport carrier in orchestration/issues/rest/dto. The new audit field stays raw here so HTTP sanitization remains at the transport boundary before mapping into orchestration enums.
models.notes: Compact constructor sanitizes all list fields to immutable lists and strips null elements; audit does not enforce supported values in the DTO.

models.justification: IssueDto remains the primary REST issue payload reused by search and create. Adding optional changeSets adapts the shared orchestration Issue model for HTTP without introducing a search only DTO hierarchy.
models.notes: Annotate the changeSets record component with @JsonInclude(Include.NON_NULL) so search and create responses omit the field when Issue.changeSets is null. changeSets reuses the existing IssueDetailDto change hierarchy, so change.field remains the shared enum value LABEL rather than the request token label.

classes.role: REST mapped orchestration input carrying IssueQuery plus normalized auditTypes for the search use case
Extensible audit discriminator with stable request value mapping for future audit types
Unified issue entity reused by search and create, now carrying nullable changeSets for optional audit enrichment
Run base issue search, short circuit when no audit is requested, otherwise fan out label event calls in parallel and merge enriched issues in original search order
Startup validate default and max page size configuration with a hard upper bound of 40
Accept the raw audit array, sanitize null elements, and keep transport lists immutable before mapping
Expose optional search changeSets in the shared issue response contract while omitting the field when null
Existing shared transport hierarchy for changeSets reused by IssueDto.changeSets so the search response matches the single issue contract
Existing change field enum already exposed by GET /api/issues/{issueId}; search audit responses keep the same LABEL output token
Map SearchIssuesRequest into SearchIssuesInput, deduplicate valid audit values, and throw ValidationException for unsupported values
Map Issue.changeSets to the existing IssueDetailDto change set transport hierarchy and preserve null omission semantics
Keep POST /api/issues/search thin while delegating the new SearchIssuesInput contract to IssuesService
Set default page size to 20 and max page size to 40 for the issues search contract
Unit coverage for no audit short circuit, label audit enrichment, failure propagation, and 40 item boundary behavior
Unit coverage that base search issues still map with changeSets null after Issue is extended
Unit coverage that IssuePage defensive copy behavior remains correct after Issue gains changeSets
Unit coverage for audit list sanitization and immutability
Unit coverage for default pagination, audit normalization, deduplication, and unsupported value validation
Unit coverage for omitted versus populated changeSets on IssueDto and preservation of the shared LABEL output contract
Unit coverage that SearchIssuesResponse defensive copy behavior remains correct after IssueDto gains nullable changeSets
HTTP boundary coverage for mapped audit searches, unsupported audit values, and perPage 41 validation
End to end search verification for no audit behavior, label enrichment, fail fast errors, and page size rejection
WireMock support updated for default per_page=20 search requests
WireMock support reused to verify label event calls are made only for audit enabled searches
Smoke scenarios for no audit omission, label audit enrichment, unsupported audit values, and perPage above 40
Operator facing request examples for default search, audit enabled search, and new validation branches
Capability inventory update for audit enabled search behavior, SearchIssuesInput, and IssueDto.changeSets
Required fast verification script referenced by the testing matrix
Required full quality gate script referenced by the testing matrix
Required Karate smoke verification script referenced by the testing matrix

compositionStrategy.description: Run the GitLab issue search first because issueIds are required for enrichment, then submit one getLabelEvents(issue.issueId()) call per returned issue via AsyncComposer, fail fast on the first error, and merge enriched Issue objects back in original search order.

slices.title: Search orchestration and shared model contract
slices.goal: Add an orchestration search input, extend Issue with nullable changeSets, enforce the hard 40 item cap, and compose label event enrichment only after the base search returns issues

unit: IssuesServiceTest: missing, null, and empty audit all return the base IssuePage and never call getLabelEvents
IssuesServiceTest: audit=[LABEL] fetches label events for each returned issueId, preserves item order, and merges changeSets onto Issue
IssuesServiceTest: one getLabelEvents failure fails the whole search request
IssuesServiceTest: perPage=40 is accepted and perPage=41 is rejected
GitLabIssuesMapperTest: base search issues map with changeSets null
IssuePageTest: IssuePage remains defensive copy safe after Issue gains nullable changeSets

logging.info: IssuesService search logs include page, perPage, auditTypes, base item count, enriched item count, and durationMs for the composed search branch

slices.title: REST contract and DTO reuse
slices.goal: Bind the audit filter at the HTTP boundary, normalize supported audit types into SearchIssuesInput, and expose optional changeSets on search items without creating a second issue DTO hierarchy

unit: IssueFiltersRequestTest: audit strips null elements and stays immutable
IssuesRequestMapperTest: default perPage becomes 20 when pagination is absent
IssuesRequestMapperTest: audit values are deduplicated and unsupported values report the offending raw value
IssuesResponseMapperTest: IssueDto omits changeSets when Issue.changeSets is null and maps the existing LABEL based change set DTOs when present
SearchIssuesResponseTest: SearchIssuesResponse remains defensive copy safe after IssueDto gains nullable changeSets
integration: IssuesControllerIT: search with audit delegates a SearchIssuesInput carrying IssueQuery plus auditTypes
IssuesControllerIT: unsupported audit value returns 400 VALIDATION_ERROR with the unsupported value in details

slices.title: Component verification and documentation
slices.goal: Prove the end to end search branches against WireMock and keep smoke and operator facing documentation aligned with the endpoint contract

component: IssuesApiComponentTest: search without audit returns issues and makes zero label event calls
IssuesApiComponentTest: search with audit returns populated changeSets from resource_label_events
IssuesApiComponentTest: one label event failure returns a full INTEGRATION_FAILURE response
IssuesApiComponentTest: perPage 41 is rejected before any GitLab search call is made

testingMatrix.coverage: IssuesServiceTest, GitLabIssuesMapperTest, IssuePageTest, IssueFiltersRequestTest, IssuesRequestMapperTest, IssuesResponseMapperTest, and SearchIssuesResponseTest cover no audit, label audit, failure, default=20, max=40, null omission semantics, and the shared LABEL output contract.
IssuesControllerIT covers mapped SearchIssuesInput delegation, unsupported audit validation, and perPage=41 rejection.

IssuesApiComponentTest proves no extra label event calls without audit, successful label enrichment with audit, full failure on one label event error, and no GitLab search call when perPage exceeds 40.
scripts/karate-test.sh must execute issues-search.feature smoke scenarios for default search, no audit omission, label audit enrichment, unsupported audit, and perPage above 40.
